benefits.desc: When you are wielding a finesse weapon with which you are proficient and would be hit by a melee attack, you can use your reaction to add your proficiency bonus to your Armor Class against that attack.

name: Deflector
desc: When you are wielding a finesse weapon with which you are proficient and would be hit by a melee attack, you can use your reaction to add your proficiency bonus to your Armor Class against that attack.
